summary: Partner Documents Upload Feature Testing Complete - All backend tests passed (14/14), Frontend UI verified working. Partners can upload 6 document types (4 required + 2 optional), admin can verify/reject documents in PartnerDetailModal Documenti tab.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<select>/<option> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/partner/documents/status returns all 6 document types with correct required/optional flags
POST /api/partner/documents/upload/{doc_type} correctly uploads files to Cloudinary with validation
DELETE /api/partner/documents/{doc_type} correctly resets non-verified documents to pending
DELETE correctly blocks deletion of verified documents (returns 400)
GET /api/admin/partners/{id}/documents returns documents with config for admin view
Admin PartnerDetailModal Documenti tab shows Documenti Onboarding section with status badge
Verify/Reject buttons appear only for 'uploaded' status documents
Reject modal opens with note input and confirm button
Rejected documents show rejection note in red text
seed_data_creation: Partner 23 (Daniele Andolfi) used for testing - documents uploaded/verified/rejected during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner documents upload feature fully functional. Document types: identity_front, identity_back, codice_fiscale (required), piva, logo (optional), distinta (required). Admin can verify/reject in PartnerDetailModal > Documenti tab. Cloudinary integration working for file uploads.
